claimText: University of Tokyo will not uniformly prohibit generative AI tools like ChatGPT in education; instead, it actively explores their potential while continuing dialogue on practical knowledge and long-term impact.

citation.citationTitle: AIツールの授業における利用について（ver. 1.0）
